summary: Tested new POST /api/re-resolve endpoint for editable scan cards feature. Fixed 2 bugs: (1) Basketball re-resolve import error - changed get_bball_player to get_bball_player_by_name, (2) League ID resolution - team-based league inference now takes priority over cached player's league. All 15 backend tests pass. Frontend code verified: Edit3 icon, scanEditMode state, handleScanEdit functions, and reResolvePick API function all present.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: scan.py line 928 - Changed 'from basketball_cache import get_bball_player' to 'from basketball_cache import get_bball_player_by_name' to match actual function name
FIXED: scan.py lines 979-984 - League ID from cached player now only overrides if team-based inference returned default fallback (71), ensuring user's team correction takes priority
VERIFIED: api.js line 170 - reResolvePick function exists and correctly calls POST /api/re-resolve
VERIFIED: App.js line 4 - Edit3 icon imported from lucide-react
VERIFIED: App.js lines 2478-2491 - Edit button renders on scan result cards with data-testid='scan-edit-btn-{idx}'
VERIFIED: App.js lines 2521-2600 - Edit mode panel with player/team/opponent inputs and confirm/cancel buttons
VERIFIED: App.js lines 714-749 - handleScanEditConfirm calls reResolvePick and updates scanResults state
test_credentials: josselj001@gmail.com (Owner/Lifetime VIP) - Whop member, no password required
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 41 tested the new re-resolve endpoint for editable scan cards. Two bugs were fixed: (1) Basketball re-resolve had wrong import name (get_bball_player vs get_bball_player_by_name), (2) League ID resolution was overriding team-based inference with cached player's league (e.g., Champions League instead of Premier League). Both fixes applied to /app/backend/routes/scan.py. Frontend code structure verified - Edit3 icon, scanEditMode state, and all handler functions are properly implemented with data-testid attributes for testing.

features_verified.re_resolve_known_player_messi: PASS - Messi/Inter Miami/LA Galaxy returns correct resolution with MLS league (253)
features_verified.re_resolve_corrected_team_name: PASS - Salah/Liverpool/Man City returns Premier League (39)
features_verified.re_resolve_unknown_player: PASS - Unknown player returns resolved=null gracefully
features_verified.re_resolve_validation: PASS - Missing/empty playerName or playerTeam returns 400/422
features_verified.re_resolve_default_sport_soccer: PASS - Defaults to soccer when sport not specified
features_verified.re_resolve_la_liga: PASS - Vinicius/Real Madrid returns La Liga (140)
features_verified.re_resolve_position_info: PASS - Returns position field in response
features_verified.re_resolve_response_structure: PASS - All fields needed for scan result update present
features_verified.frontend_re_resolve_pick_api: PASS - reResolvePick function exists in api.js

basketball_import_error.issue: Import error: cannot import name 'get_bball_player' from 'basketball_cache'
basketball_import_error.fix: Changed to 'get_bball_player_by_name' which is the actual function name

league_id_override.issue: Cached player's leagueId (e.g., Champions League 2) was overriding team-based inference (e.g., Premier League 39)
league_id_override.fix: Only use cached player's leagueId if team-based inference returned default fallback (71)
